# Analyze item *d'*

## Load data sets
```{r}
list.item_dprimes = "data/ses-ret_task-prism_desc-item_dprimes_beh.RDS" |> 
  read_rds()

ids_to_exclude = "data/ses-ret_task-prism_desc-ids_to_exclude_beh.RDS" |> 
  read_rds()

cond_levels = c("no_lapse_no_trigger", "lapse_no_trigger", "lapse_trigger")
cond_labels = c("NoLapse", "Lapse", "LapseTrigger")

df.item_dp_cond = list.item_dprimes$by_subj_x_realtime_trigger |>
  filter(!participant_id %in% ids_to_exclude) |>
  mutate(
    condition = factor(trigger_status, levels = cond_levels, labels = cond_labels)
  )

# check cell counts before model fitting
df.item_dp_cond |> 
  pull(condition) |> 
  levels()

df.item_dp_cond |> 
  pull(condition) |> 
  table()
```

## Bayesian model
```{r fig.height=20, warning=FALSE}
fit.brm_item_dprime_pupil = brm(
  item_dp ~ 0 + condition,
  data    = df.item_dp_cond,
  family  = gaussian(),
  chains  = 4,
  cores   = 4,
  seed    = 512,
  iter    = 4000,
  warmup  = 1000,
  file    = "models/brm_item_dprime_pupil"
)

fit.brm_item_dprime_pupil |> 
  summary()

fit.brm_item_dprime_pupil |> 
  plot(nvariables = 8)

fit.brm_item_dprime_pupil |> 
  pp_check(ndraws = 100)

fit.brm_item_dprime_pupil |> 
  as_draws_df() |> 
  select(starts_with("b_"), sigma) |> 
  pivot_longer(cols = everything(),
               names_to = "variable",
               values_to = "value") |>  
  ggplot(mapping = aes(y = fct_rev(variable),
                       x = value)) +
  stat_halfeye(fill = "lightblue") + 
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0.0, linetype = "dashed") +
  theme(axis.title.y = element_blank())

# Lapse < NoLapse
hypothesis(fit.brm_item_dprime_pupil, "conditionLapse < conditionNoLapse")

# LapseTrigger > Lapse
hypothesis(fit.brm_item_dprime_pupil, "conditionLapseTrigger > conditionLapse")

# LapseTrigger < NoLapse
hypothesis(fit.brm_item_dprime_pupil, "conditionLapseTrigger < conditionNoLapse")

fit.brm_item_dprime_pupil |> 
  emmeans(pairwise ~ condition)
```

```{r fig.width=6, fig.height=5, fig.dpi=300}
contrast_draws <- fit.brm_item_dprime_pupil %>%
  spread_draws(
    b_conditionNoLapse,
    b_conditionLapse,
    b_conditionLapseTrigger
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    `Lapse – No Lapse`         = b_conditionLapse - b_conditionNoLapse,
    `Trigger – Lapse`          = b_conditionLapseTrigger - b_conditionLapse,
    `No Lapse – Trigger`       = b_conditionNoLapse - b_conditionLapseTrigger
  ) %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols      = matches("–"),
    names_to  = "contrast",
    values_to = ".value"
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    contrast = factor(contrast, levels = c(
      "No Lapse – Trigger", # bottom
      "Trigger – Lapse", # middle
      "Lapse – No Lapse" # top
    ))
  )

fill_by_type <- c(
  "Lapse – No Lapse"    = "#D62729",
  "Trigger – Lapse"     = "#F67E00",
  "No Lapse – Trigger"  = "#FCBF4A"
)

plot.item_memory_contrasts = contrast_draws %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = .value, y = contrast, fill = contrast)) +
  stat_halfeye(
    point_interval = median_hdi,
    .width         = c(0.66, 0.9),
    slab_alpha     = 0.8,
    normalize      = "panels",
    point_size      = 4
  ) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.66, color = "black") +
  geom_text(
    data = contrast_draws %>% group_by(contrast) %>% summarise(m = median(.value)),
    aes(x = m, y = contrast, label = contrast),
    vjust = -0.8, hjust = 0.5, size = 6, inherit.aes = FALSE, family = "Inter"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = fill_by_type) +
  scale_y_discrete(labels = NULL) +
  labs(
    x     = "Posterior contrast (d\u2032)",
    y     = NULL,
    title = "Item memory"
  ) +
  theme(
    legend.position    = "none",
    panel.grid.minor   = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y       = element_blank(),
    axis.line.y        = element_blank()
  )

plot.item_memory_contrasts
```
